args.query:
WITH swift_nonbinary AS (
  SELECT c.id,
         c.sample_repo_name AS repo_name,
         c.sample_path AS path,
         CASE 
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary: true%' THEN 1
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary%' AND c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%true%' THEN 1
           ELSE 0
         END AS is_binary
  FROM contents c
  WHERE c.sample_path ILIKE '%.swift'
), filtered AS (
  SELECT id, repo_name, path
  FROM swift_nonbinary
  WHERE is_binary = 0
)
SELECT id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT repo_name || '|' || path) AS copies,
       MIN(repo_name) AS example_repo
FROM filtered
GROUP BY id
ORDER BY copies DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH swift_nonbinary AS (
  SELECT c.id,
         c.sample_repo_name AS repo_name,
         c.sample_path AS path,
         CASE 
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary: true%' THEN 1
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary%' AND c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%true%' THEN 1
           ELSE 0
         END AS is_binary
  FROM contents c
  WHERE c.sample_path ILIKE '%.swift'
), filtered AS (
  SELECT id, repo_name, path
  FROM swift_nonbinary
  WHERE is_binary = 0
)
SELECT id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT repo_name || '|' || path) AS copies,
       MIN(repo_name) AS example_repo
FROM filtered
GROUP BY id
ORDER BY copies DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH swift_nonbinary AS (
  SELECT c.id,
         c.sample_repo_name AS repo_name,
         c.sample_path AS path,
         CASE 
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary: true%' THEN 1
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary%' AND c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%true%' THEN 1
           ELSE 0
         END AS is_binary
  FROM contents c
  WHERE c.sample_path ILIKE '%.swift'
), filtered AS (
  SELECT id, repo_name, path
  FROM swift_nonbinary
  WHERE is_binary = 0
), counts AS (
  SELECT id, COUNT(DISTINCT repo_name || '|' || path) AS copies
  FROM filtered
  GROUP BY id
)
SELECT f.repo_name,
       f.path,
       c.copies,
       f.id
FROM filtered f
JOIN counts c USING (id)
WHERE c.copies = (SELECT MAX(copies) FROM counts)
ORDER BY f.repo_name, f.path
LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql:
WITH swift_nonbinary AS (
  SELECT c.id,
         c.sample_repo_name AS repo_name,
         c.sample_path AS path,
         CASE 
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary: true%' THEN 1
           WHEN c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary%' AND c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%true%' THEN 1
           ELSE 0
         END AS is_binary
  FROM contents c
  WHERE c.sample_path ILIKE '%.swift'
), filtered AS (
  SELECT id, repo_name, path
  FROM swift_nonbinary
  WHERE is_binary = 0
), counts AS (
  SELECT id, COUNT(DISTINCT repo_name || '|' || path) AS copies
  FROM filtered
  GROUP BY id
)
SELECT f.repo_name,
       f.path,
       c.copies,
       f.id
FROM filtered f
JOIN counts c USING (id)
WHERE c.copies = (SELECT MAX(copies) FROM counts)
ORDER BY f.repo_name, f.path
LIMIT 50;
